detailed_description.heading: Enterprise Access Control
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti G6 Entry is an intelligent door entry system designed specifically for enterprise and professional environments where security, reliability, and integration are critical. It combines high-quality video surveillance with advanced access control features in a single compact device. With native integration into UniFi Protect and UniFi Access, G6 Entry enables centralized management of video monitoring, door access, and user permissions from a unified interface. The system supports modern authentication methods, including NFC cards and keyfobs, mobile unlock, and Apple and Google Wallet credentials. Built-in face recognition and smart detections for people, vehicles, and animals further enhance situational awareness and security automation. Two-way audio and doorbell functionality allow clear communication with visitors in real time. The device is optimized for corporate offices, commercial buildings, and regulated facilities that require dependable access control with modern user experience.

detailed_description.heading: Professional Video Monitoring
detailed_description.text: G6 Entry features a dual-camera system that delivers detailed visual coverage for both people and packages. The main 5 MP camera provides a wide 180-degree diagonal field of view, ensuring full coverage of the entry area, while the dedicated 8 MP package camera captures high-resolution images of deliveries placed near the door. Both cameras use CMOS sensors and support advanced image processing, including HDR, noise reduction, exposure control, and customizable image settings. Smart detection capabilities enable accurate identification of people, vehicles, and animals, while built-in face recognition enhances access security and audit trails. Infrared night vision with integrated IR LEDs ensures clear visibility in low-light conditions up to 5 meters. With smooth video at up to 30 FPS on the main camera, the system delivers reliable monitoring day and night, making it ideal for high-traffic entrances and professional security deployments.

detailed_description.heading: Robust & Reliable
detailed_description.text: Designed for continuous operation in demanding environments, the G6 Entry is built with a robust aluminum enclosure that provides IK07 tamper resistance and IP55 protection against dust and water exposure. This durable construction allows the device to be deployed reliably both indoors and outdoors, even in high-traffic or publicly accessible areas. Flexible installation is supported through multiple mounting options, including wall mount, gang box mount, and an included 20-degree wedge mount, making it easy to achieve optimal camera positioning. Power and data are transmitted through a single Ethernet cable with PoE+ support, making installation easier and minimizing cable clutter. Integrated status LEDs, a ring button, a tamper detection switch, and a built-in speaker offer clear visual and audio feedback for users and administrators. The system is engineered to operate consistently in temperatures ranging from –30 to 50 °C and in high-humidity conditions. Compliance with NDAA requirements and certifications such as CE, FCC, and IC ensures suitability for enterprise, government, and other regulated deployments.

items.name: Sensor
items.value: 5 MP CMOS Sensor, 8 MP CMOS Sensor

items.name: Night Mode
items.value: IR LED Illumination and IR Cut Filter, IR Range up to 5 m
